SymbolDefinition
S = (R, K, F)Relational database schema
RSet of relations (tables) in the database
K(r)Primary key attributes of relation r
Fk(r)Foreign key attributes of relation r
F(r)Attributes (columns) of relation r
DocTable(r)Textual description of table r
DocCol(r, f )Textual description of attribute f in table r
Ot = (Ct, Pt, At)|(Core ontology at iteration t
CtSet of OWL classes defined so far
PtSet of OWL properties (object and data)
AtSet of OWL axioms and annotations
∆OrDelta-ontology fragment generated for relation r
OfinalFinal integrated OWL ontology after processing all relations
